attributes.subject: Church volunteer schedule for May
attributes.body:
Hi everyone,

I meant to send this sooner. For May, the setup team should arrive at 8:15 AM, and greeters should be in place by 8:45 AM. I still need to confirm nursery coverage for the second service.

Thanks,
Joseph
